promoted_facts.fact: Jury trial waiver — both parties waive right to trial by jury (FA §17.1)
promoted_facts.action: Added jury_trial_waiver: true to dispute_resolution in canonical

promoted_facts.fact: Punitive damages waiver — both parties waive right to punitive/exemplary damages (FA §17.2)
promoted_facts.action: Added punitive_damages_waiver: true to dispute_resolution in canonical

promoted_facts.fact: Interest rate on overdue amounts: 18% per annum (FA §16.15), vs. 1.5%/month in FDD Item 6
promoted_facts.action: Added interest_rate_per_annum: '18% or maximum lawful rate' to fees in canonical

promoted_facts.fact: Prevailing party entitled to recover attorneys' fees and costs (FA §16.14)
promoted_facts.action: Added attorneys_fees_prevailing_party: true to dispute_resolution in canonical

promoted_facts.fact: Confidentiality of negotiated terms — disclosure is a default (FA §16.18)
promoted_facts.action: Added confidentiality_of_negotiated_terms: true to contract_terms in canonical

promoted_facts.fact: Exemption acknowledgment — franchise sale exceeds $1,469,600 threshold (FA §18.0)
promoted_facts.action: Added ftc_exemption_threshold: '$1,469,600' to contract_terms in canonical

promoted_facts.fact: Food and Beverage Consultant must be approved by franchisor — distinctive to Graduate brand
promoted_facts.action: Added fb_consultant_approval_required: true to brand_overview in canonical

promoted_facts.fact: Franchisor may condition any amendment or waiver on franchisee executing an estoppel and general release of claims (FA §16.8)
promoted_facts.action: Added general_release_required_for_amendments: true to contract_terms in canonical

promoted_facts.fact: Graduate brand code is 'GU' in the reservation system
promoted_facts.action: Added chain_code: 'GU' to brand_overview in canonical
